creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172899
prips-1.0.0.patch

- Update to 1.0.0
- Add CFLAGS c99 to fix building on 9.3
- Take maintainer'ship

Changelog:
	http://devel.ringlet.net/sysutils/prips/ChangeLog

portlint: OK
	looks fine.

testport: OK
	poudriere: i386,  10.3 (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.3 (tested)

	poudriere: i386,  9.3  (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3  (tested)

	poudriere: i386,  11   (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 11   (tested)
